perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man in a blue puffer jacket and a flat cap stands next to a woman in a yellow jacket. She gestures to the camera while talking. (2) The man speaks with a suggestive expression, rubbing his hands together. (3) They attempt a static electricity challenge by rubbing their arms vigorously and then trying to touch index fingers. (4) They rub their backs against each other while standing in a living room area. (5) They attempt to touch fingers again but no reaction occurs. The woman walks away disappointed. (6) A different young woman in a grey cardigan enters a white-walled room, expressing surprise. (7) She and another individual (only arms visible) rub their backs against a wall and then touch fingers, resulting in a visual spark graphic.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo background music starts. A woman's voice is high-pitched and energetic, followed by a man's lower-toned, playful voice. (2) Rapid friction sounds (rubbing clothes) are heard over the music. (3) Sounds of laughter and playful exclamations. (4) A transition sound effect (swoosh) leads to a different female voice speaking excitedly. (5) Friction sounds repeat. (6) A sharp 'ding' or electricity spark sound effect plays at the end, accompanied by a final call to action in a female voice.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 想知道我們結婚10年 (Want to know our 10 years of marriage) - Hook text. (2) 都如何保持愛的火花嗎? (How to keep the spark of love?) - Hook text. (3) 用摩擦! (By friction!) - Suggestive joke text. (4) 18禁 (18+) - Humorously warning graphic. (5) (傻眼) (Dumbfounded) - Reaction sticker. (6) 沒有啊!? (Nothing!?) - Confused tone. (7) 10年了! 不來電了! (10 years! No more spark!) - Disappointed realization. (8) 怎麼可能!! 我們來試看看! (How is it possible!! Let's try!) - Transition hook. (9) 趕快來試試看吧! (Come and try it quickly!) - Call to action.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Failed Experiment (Long-term couple) -> Successful Experiment (Younger person) -> CTA

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 man (Tim), 1 woman (Wife) in the first half; 1 young woman in the second half; 1 person with only back/arm visible during the successful spark.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man with glasses and a grey flat cap; a woman with long hair in a bright yellow puffer jacket; a young woman with long hair in a grey cardigan.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First scene is a furnished interior with a green rug and modern art; second scene shows studio lighting equipment (softbox); third scene is a plain white wall.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Comedic Failure -> Proof of Concept -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This video is a lighthearted social media challenge designed to engage viewers through humor. It uses the metaphor of 'static electricity' to joke about the lack of 'spark' in a 10-year marriage compared to a younger person, ultimately encouraging viewers to try the static electricity experiment themselves.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Watermarked social media handles for the creator's channel.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Tim's energetic intro and the use of variety-show style subtitles.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages a trending physical challenge (static electricity) to create relatable relationship content.
